title: Respond at personal-ledger scale
description: Interactive agent operations remain responsive for the initial three-account personal dataset without a daemon, remote cache, or external database.
target: At 100000 active transactions, first-page filtered actuals and full-set aggregates complete within 2 seconds at p95, and ordinary single-entity writes complete within 1 second at p95, excluding backup, restore, and migration.
load_condition: Three accounts, 100000 active transactions plus retained correction and relationship history, one OS identity, one writer, and no concurrent load on the supported reference workstation.
measurement: Thirty warmed repetitions per representative query and write scenario using monotonic elapsed time; report p50 and p95.
rationale: This gives design a measurable local baseline without adopting service infrastructure prematurely.
